feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: on a stormy sea of moving emotion (tossed about, i'm like a ship on the ocean)
entry.summary:
Author: AroAceUpMySleeves

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,894Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck and Eddie are physically safe but far from okay. What started as a practical decision to keep an eye on Buck during the night turns to something more intimate. Sharing a bed is less out of necessity than it is for comfort. OR Buck and Eddie share a bed in the aftermath of Season 9 Episode 13

entry.title: Evangaline Buckley Begins
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,140Chapters: 22/24Kudos: 478

Summary: Evangaline Buckley has been alone for most of her life. She was unwanted by her parents and left by her sister when she had the first chance. For her most formative years, she had to go to extreme lengths just to get attention from those meant to care for her, failing more often than not.After finding out the truth about her creation, Evie decides that she has to do something – anything. She goes through even more pain and heartbreak before finding herself where she was always meant to end up. -+- This is both a prologue and season 1 rewrite.New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,632Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 98

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: I'll leave the porch light on
entry.summary:
Author: Buckley118diaz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,865Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 106

Summary: it was a normal shift, nothing major, nothing boring, but the team still felt off. There were no sarcastic retorts from Buck. There was no irresistably contagious laughter from Buck. There were no fun facts from Buck. There was nothing. And everyone noticed. or Buck has seasonal depression and relapses. Eddie is there for him.

entry.title: in perfect symmetry
entry.summary:
Author: ari_kart

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,876Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 199

Summary: There is something so glaringly not Buck about the scene in front of him. That knot of dread becomes a boulder, plunging into Eddie’s gut and nearly knocking the wind out of him. “Hey, Chris, wait here a second, would you?” Eddie’s already crossing the threshold. “But, it’s just Buck-” “Chris,” Eddie turns around, scrambling to collect the worries that are slipping through his internal defenses like a sieve. He meets Christopher’s gaze, his son no longer a boy but a young man. He doesn’t ask or demand. He begs. “Please. Please just wait.” It’s probably fine. All a misunderstanding. Eddie is jumping to conclusions. Even at his worst, Buck would never—but if Eddie’s worries are well-founded, he would never forgive himself for letting Chris see what’s inside that house. - Or, Eddie uses his key to Buck's house and finds himself in a situation that is all too familiar, only this time he's on the other side of the door.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Exile (I Think I've Seen This Before, and I Didn't Like The Ending)
entry.summary:
Author: MysticCloud97

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,414Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 73

Summary: Buck was struggling. The pills were the only thing keeping him sane after the kidnapping. Everyone knew that he was hiding something. It just took one too many pills for them to realise how broken Buck was. Now they must rally together to bring their sunshine back. And to stop him following in Bobby's footsteps.

entry.title: “Eddie, do we even have that much money?!”
entry.summary:
Author: marry_rites

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,042Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: “Alright folks, how many bucks is one Buck worth?” The man’s voice echoed in the hall. Surprisingly he was the only one who didn’t seem to shy away from their table. “Please put your hands together—” Sebastian moved forward a little, anticipation palpable in his posture. “Here he comes.” Marcus felt his lips twitch in joy just seeing his son finally showing some emotions other than boredom, depression and anxiety. “—for Evan ‘Buck’ Buckley!”   OR Some special guests end up attending the auction and Eddie is less than happy when someone bids on Buck.

entry.title: Drop the Bottle
entry.summary:
Author: em_likes_poetry

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,607Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 132

Summary: He pulled the door open, calling out his actions into the unlit home. He heard a clatter to his left. Why was the house so dark? He pawed at the wall and flicked a light on, revealing Buck kneeling on the ground, hand behind his back. “I left my keys." Or, what if Eddie went back? What if he saw what Buck was doing?

entry.title: I’ll Always Come Running Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: Beguiling_Soliloquy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,662Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 29

Summary: When Eddie left for Texas, he knew he’d be leaving so many things behind. His friends, his mentor, his house, and most importantly, the man he loved. But he needed to work to get his son back. And if that meant leaving his own world partly behind, then so be it.He never expected to be left in the dark after he got into an argument with Buck. He regrets what he said to him, but by the time he finds the courage to apologize, it might be too late, and the last words Buck would ever hear from Eddie were angry ones.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: what brings you in today? (don't state the obvious)
entry.summary:
Author: lexisdelusional

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,600Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

Summary: Buck’s doing fine. No, seriously. He is completely fine. He understands the doubt from everyone, the skepticism—he’s definitely been known to downplay things to stay on the job, or avoid awkward conversations, or in an effort not to be left behind. He gets it, really. But he’s fine. It’s not the worst thing that’s ever happened to him. The ladder truck crushing his leg and losing his job was worse. Eddie moving to Texas was worse. Losing Bobby…was worse. So truly, honestly, seriously—Buck is fine. Well, mostly. Except for one thing.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Minute That Wouldn’t End
entry.summary:
Author: lako

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,264Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 39

Summary: A deeply tired, ugly little part of Eddie wanted to know what would happen if he simply sat down on the apparatus floor and bled through his shirt. Would they notice then? Or would he have to actually pass out first? He hated that thought as soon as he had it. It wasn’t fair. They loved Buck because Buck was lovable, because he was family, because he had just been kidnapped and tortured and dragged through hell. Eddie loved him too. Maybe more than was good for him. Certainly more than was wise. And if Eddie had made himself harder to care for, then that wasn’t on them.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Lockout
entry.summary:
Author: CourtepointeClementine

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,976Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 172

Summary: "Why is he so self-sacrificing all the time?" Eddie asks.Maddie nods. He looks back at her, only to find that her eyes are a little shiny — Eddie probably could have anticipated that she might get worked up about all this. And then, all at once, it's like she bursts, unable or unwilling to keep holding it all in. "I hate it too. I can't believe he was just so ready to stay there, to be Derek.""Wait —""Like, after everything with Daniel? All he's done to learn who Buck is? He's just. Going to pretend to be someone else's kid?" A tear shoots down her cheek and she wipes it away with the napkin from before."Wait, wait, wait," Eddie says. "I'm confused. What are you talking about?"Maddie sniffs and looks at him in surprise. "What are you talking about?"Eddie visits Buck, then Maddie, then Buck again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Two More Little Lines
entry.summary:
Author: WellHelloHello

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,864Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 87

Summary: As soon as she got home she did all four tests and set a timer on her phone. She paced around, too anxious to stand still, waiting for the results. It wasn’t that she was scared because she didn’t want a kid, she was scared because she might have to seriously sit down and make some extremely difficult decisions. Eventually the timer went so she walked over to the bathroom counter, looking down at all four tests. Positive. There were four positives. or Buck's first pregnancy hadn't been the smoothest, but number two is far, far worse.

entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,444Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 358

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)
